name: Diabetic Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sugar and Sugar Twin with the margarine until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and mix well.
3. Sift together the flour and baking soda into a separate bowl.
4. Stir in the milk and vinegar mixture.
5. Fold in the mashed bananas.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 5 loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Allow to cool, then cut into 20 slices.
Nutrients per slice: Calories 108, fat 3.6g, cholesterol 14 mg, carbohydrate 17g, sodium 63mg. Exchanges: Bread 1, fruit 1/4, fat 1.
